name: Molasses Sourdough Pumpernickel Bread
recipeIngredient: 1 Egg yolk mixed with 1 tbsp water
recipeInstructions:
1. In a pan, melt the butter and stir in the milk, salt, and molasses.
2. Add the 2 cups of sourdough starter, bran cereal, rye flour, and 2 cups of all-purpose flour. Beat until well blended.
3. Work in the remaining flour as needed to knead the dough until smooth and elastic. Turn out onto a lightly floured board and knead for about 10 minutes.
4. Place into a well-greased bowl, cover, and let rise until doubled in size.
5. Punch down the dough. Grease two cookie sheets.
6. Shape the dough into three round loaves and gently flatten them.
7. Let rise again until doubled in size.
8. Make 1/2-inch slashes on each loaf's top.
9. Brush with the egg yolk mixture.
10. Bake at 350°F for 40 minutes or until golden brown.
Sour
